reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para cargar combustible porque después tenés un largo trechonsin estaciones de servicio

(Translated by Google)
Good place to refuel because afterwards you have a long stretch with no gas stations
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkLU56MmFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Pasamos la noche en el campo que hay detrás de la estación de servicio. Habían muchos baños, todos equipados con papel. Limpios y había jabón en los dispensadores. Su estado estaba mejor que muchas otras estaciones de servicio que visitamos en el viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. We spent the night in the field behind the gas station. There were plenty of restrooms, all equipped with toilet paper. They were clean, and there was soap in the dispensers. Their condition was better than many other gas stations we visited on the trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkdUkzWG1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nos atendieron muy bien. Baños en buen estado. Lastima que wifi no andaba y en la zona solo tiene señal de datos Movistar.

(Translated by Google)
We received excellent service. The restrooms were in good condition. It's a shame the Wi-Fi wasn't working, and the area only has Movistar data coverage.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por su comentario Pilar , apreciamos mucho su visita. Saludos
